RUN 183 REPORT

Result: DEFEAT - Floor 23 (Act 2, Fight 3)
Killed by: Cultist + Chosen
Character: Ironclad A0
Boss: Collector (never reached)

Deck (20 cards): 2x Strike, 4x Defend, Bash, Impervious, Armaments, Headbutt, Shrug It Off, Iron Wave, Flame Barrier, Clothesline, Pommel Strike, Fiend Fire, Limit Break+, Dark Embrace+, Inflame, Thunderclap
Relics: Black Blood, Kunai, Ink Bottle, Blood Vial

ACT 1 SUMMARY:
- Beat The Guardian boss on Turn 18 (240 HP fight)
- Key strategy: Mode Shift cancellation on every Fierce Bash, Flame Barrier counter damage, Headbutt top-deck loops
- Won with 36/80 HP, healed to 42 via Burning Blood
- Boss reward: Limit Break (rare card), Black Blood (boss relic, +12 HP/fight)

ACT 2 SUMMARY:
- Floor 18 (F1): 3 Byrds fight. Lost 28 HP (80->52). Flame Barrier counter damage was key (20 damage per 5-hit Peck, IGNORES Flight). Took 7 turns.
- Floor 19 (F2): Shop. Bought Inflame (75g) + removed Strike (75g). Critical Str gap filled.
- Floor 20 (F3): Purifier event! Free Strike removal. Lucky.
- Floor 21 (F4): Shop. Bought Thunderclap (50g) + removed Strike (100g). AOE gap filled.
- Floor 22 (F5): Looter + Mugger. Lost 15g to Thievery, killed Looter, Mugger escaped. Took Dark Embrace+ reward.
- Floor 23 (F6): Cultist + Chosen. DIED.

DEATH ANALYSIS:
The Cultist+Chosen fight was fatal because:
1. Cultist gained +3 Str/turn from Ritual, reaching Str 6 by Turn 4 (18 damage) and Str 9 by Turn 5 (22 damage)
2. Chosen applied Hex (Skills add Dazed) limiting defensive options
3. Chosen applied Vulnerable 2 to me via Debilitate, amplifying ALL incoming damage by 50%
4. Turn 4 was the critical turn: 47 incoming damage with Vulnerable, only 0-5 block available
5. Fiend Fire on Turn 3 exhausted Impervious (the one card that could have saved Turn 4)

KEY MISTAKES:
1. FIEND FIRE TIMING (Turn 3): Playing Fiend Fire to deal 28 damage on Chosen was correct for kill speed, BUT it exhausted Impervious. Impervious (30 block) would have saved me on Turn 4 (needed ~20 block to survive). The exhaust was permanently fatal.
2. ALTERNATIVE: Should have played Impervious on Turn 3 (30 block vs 19 incoming = zero damage) and saved Fiend Fire for Turn 4 when I had Vulnerable debuff and needed both block AND burst.
3. FRONT-LOADED STR DELAY: Inflame was never played despite being drawn. If Inflame was active earlier, attacks would have dealt 2 more each, potentially killing Chosen 1-2 turns sooner.

LESSON: In fights with Hex (Chosen), do NOT exhaust defensive cards via Fiend Fire unless the burst KILLS the target. Chosen at 65 HP was too healthy to kill in 1 turn. Should have played defense-first and attacked over multiple turns.

NEW HEURISTIC:
- Fiend Fire in Chosen fights: ONLY use if the burst kills the target. Otherwise, exhausting Impervious/Flame Barrier is fatal because Hex limits Skill plays for block.
- Against Cultist+Chosen specifically: Cultist Ritual 3 means Str escalates by +3/turn. Combined with Chosen Debilitate (Vuln 2), the damage spike on Turn 4-5 is lethal. Must keep Impervious available for the Vuln turns.
